creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #1)

Where can I set the maintainer-approval? Is there a way to attach the patch from within command line as it was in the past with "port"?

[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]$ port submit
Port submit is currently broken
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]$

That would help a lot :)
